extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF, extract its text with UTF-8 encoding, and save it to a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-to-memory-stream.title: Extract PDF Text In-Memory
extract-pdf-text-to-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, extracting its text with PdfExtractor, and writing the result to another MemoryStream for in‑memory processing.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Text Using PdfExtractor
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text into a MemoryStream, and determine if any text was found.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Text Files
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write each output to a .txt file with the same name.

check-pdf-for-text-and-images.title: Check PDF for Text and Images using PdfExtractor
check-pdf-for-text-and-images.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains both textual content and images.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PdfExtractor, bind a PDF file, enable text extraction, extract both text and images, and save the results to separate files.

extract-text-from-password-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
extract-text-from-password-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to supply the owner password to PdfExtractor and extract text from an encrypted PDF document.

extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and write it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.title: Extract Text from PDF Bytes Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.description: Shows how to extract text directly from a PDF stored in a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor without writing the file to disk.

extract-pdf-text-page-by-page.title: Extract PDF Text Page by Page
extract-pdf-text-page-by-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a PDF and save each page's content into separate .txt files.

pdf-extractor-text-extraction-test.title: Unit Test for PdfExtractor Text Extraction
pdf-extractor-text-extraction-test.description: Shows how to write an NUnit test that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF file and verify the extracted content.

extract-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates a console application that loads a PDF file, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and writes the extracted Unicode text to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder with Aspose.Pdf
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each PDF page, accumulate it in a StringBuilder, and optionally write the result to a file.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a folder and write each result to a separate .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-verify-temp-file.title: Extract PDF Text and Verify with Temporary File
extract-pdf-text-verify-temp-file.description: Extracts text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, writes the extracted content to a temporary file, reads it back, and confirms that the in‑memory and file contents match.

extract-pdf-text-and-encrypt-aes.title: Extract PDF Text and Encrypt with AES
extract-pdf-text-and-encrypt-aes.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and encrypting the resulting plain‑text with AES‑256 before saving it to a file.

pdf-text-extraction-service.title: Folder Monitoring PDF Text Extraction Service
pdf-text-extraction-service.description: Demonstrates a Windows‑service‑like class that watches a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf to extract all text into corresponding .txt files.

check-pdf-text-only-by-extracting-images.title: Check if PDF is Text‑Only by Extracting Images
check-pdf-text-only-by-extracting-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to detect images in a PDF and determine whether the document contains only text.

create-a-rest-api-endpoint-that-receives.title: Create A Rest Api Endpoint That Receives A Pdf Byte Array And Returns Extracted Text As Json

extract-pdf-text-to-postgres.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-to-postgres.description: Demonstrates how to extract all textual content from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and insert the result into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

async-pdf-text-extraction-with-cancellat.title: Asynchronous PDF Text Extraction with Cancellation Support
async-pdf-text-extraction-with-cancellat.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while honoring a CancellationToken, allowing the operation to be aborted on user request.

extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream for Further PDF Generation
extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, storing it in a MemoryStream, and passing the stream to another component for PDF creation.

pdf-text-extraction-azure-function.title: Azure Function to Extract PDF Text and Save as Blob
pdf-text-extraction-azure-function.description: Demonstrates a scheduled Azure Function that reads a PDF from Azure Blob Storage, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and writes the result back to a blob as a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as GZip File
extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZip compressed stream, reducing storage size.

batch-pdf-text-extraction-azure-blob.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction from Azure Blob Storage
batch-pdf-text-extraction-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in an Azure Blob container, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and upload the resulting .txt files back to the container.

pdf-diagnostic-tool-counts.title: Report PDF Page, Image, and Attachment Counts
pdf-diagnostic-tool-counts.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to count the total pages, images, and attachments in a PDF document.

create-pdf-summary-from-first-three-page.title: Create PDF Summary from First Three Pages
create-pdf-summary-from-first-three-page.description: Demonstrates extracting text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and generating a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary document.

retry-pdf-text-extraction.title: Retry Text Extraction from PDF Using PdfExtractor
retry-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and implement a retry loop that attempts the extraction up to three times when an IOException occurs.

extract-text-from-pdf-cli.title: Extract Text from PDF using Aspose PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-cli.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor in a console app to read a PDF file, extract its text, and write the result to standard output.

extract-pdf-text-azure-table.title: Extract PDF Text and Save to Azure Table
extract-pdf-text-azure-table.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and store the extracted content in Azure Table Storage with the document ID as the partition key.

async-extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Asynchronously Extract Text and Images from PDF
async-extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor with async/await to extract all text, per‑page text files, and images from a PDF without blocking the UI thread.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter for Logging
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, capture it in a MemoryStream, and write the result into a StringWriter for integration with logging frameworks.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration file to enable or disable extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract only images from pages 5‑10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

extract-images-defined-in-resources.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
extract-images-defined-in-resources.description: Demonstrates setting the ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and extracting all resource‑based images from a PDF using the PdfExtractor facade.

extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.title: Extract PDF Images as BMP Preserving Resolution
extract-pdf-images-as-bmp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull embedded images from a PDF and save them as BMP files while retaining the original resolution and color depth.

export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality 85
export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory.

extract-images-to-base64.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64
extract-images-to-base64.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, turn each image stream into a Base64 string, and serialize the collection as JSON.

extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF for Archival
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, configure lossless TIFF settings, and save all pages as a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-images-validate-signature.title: Extract Images from PDF and Verify File Signatures
extract-images-validate-signature.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them to disk, and validate each image's integrity by checking its file signature (magic number).

parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-images-to-unc-share.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Share with Fallback
extract-images-to-unc-share.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and saving them to a network UNC path, with validation and a local fallback if the share is inaccessible.

extract-images-and-create-thumbnails.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
extract-images-and-create-thumbnails.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generating PNG thumbnails with a maximum dimension of 200 × 200 pixels.

extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor inside a using block to ensure the extractor is disposed automatically.

extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF
extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract all embedded images, and save them as PNG files.

extract-text-ignoring-images.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
extract-text-ignoring-images.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content of a PDF by omitting any image extraction calls.

extract-images-from-a-pdf-and-embed-them.title: Extract Images From A Pdf And Embed Them Into An Html Report Using Base64 Data Uris

handle-corrupted-pdf-binding.title: Handle Corrupted PDF Binding with PdfExtractor
handle-corrupted-pdf-binding.description: Shows how to catch and handle exceptions thrown by PdfExtractor when attempting to bind a corrupted PDF file.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with an embedded image, extract all images using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and upload the extracted images to an Azure Blob container.

extract-images-from-pdf-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-png.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each as a losslessly compressed PNG file.

extract-images-original-format.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
extract-images-original-format.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting the ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert each PDF page to an image, save the images, and generate a CSV file that lists each image's file name, page number, and dimensions.

extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.description: The example creates a sample PDF containing an image, extracts each image using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, and uploads the extracted PNG files to an Amazon S3 bucket via the AWS SDK.

extract-pdf-text-per-page-progress.title: Extract PDF Text Per Page with Progress Reporting
extract-pdf-text-per-page-progress.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while reporting progress to the console.

extract-all-images-from-pdf.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 to process all pages.

extract-images-ocr-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI
extract-images-ocr-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using PdfExtractor and applying OpenAI OCR via Aspose.Pdf.AI to retrieve hidden textual information.

list-embedded-attachment-names.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
list-embedded-attachment-names.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to retrieve the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without extracting the files.

extract-embedded-attachments-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Attachments from PDF
extract-embedded-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract all file attachments embedded in a PDF and save each one to a specified output directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-rename-timestamp.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Rename with Timestamp
extract-pdf-attachments-rename-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded files from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, prepend a timestamp to each original filename, and save the renamed files to disk.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and verify their integrity by calculating SHA-256 hashes.

extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.description: Demonstrates how to extract all embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save them into subfolders grouped by their original file extensions.

test-image-extraction-mode.title: Test ImageExtractionMode Affects Extracted Image Count
test-image-extraction-mode.description: Demonstrates a unit test that verifies the PdfExtractor.ExtractImageMode property influences the number of images extracted from a PDF document.

extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each image with a unique GUID filename to avoid naming collisions. Includes creation of a sample PDF containing an embedded PNG for a self‑contained example.

extract-images-to-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP
extract-images-to-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and package them into a ZIP archive.

create-contact-sheet-pdf.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
create-contact-sheet-pdf.description: Extracts all images from a source PDF and assembles them into a contact sheet PDF with thumbnails arranged in a configurable grid.

extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio from Extracted Images
extract-images-create-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using the PdfExtractor facade and assemble them into a new PDF where each image occupies a full page, forming a portfolio document.

extract-images-with-watermark.title: Extract Images from PDF After Adding Watermark
extract-images-with-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a watermark image on each PDF page using PdfFileStamp, then extract all images from the watermarked PDF with PdfExtractor.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-base64-json.title: Extract Images from PDF to Base64 JSON
extract-images-from-pdf-to-base64-json.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, converts each image to a Base64 string, and writes a formatted JSON file containing the image data and metadata.

extract-images-pdf-csv-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-pdf-csv-report.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them as PNG files, and creating a CSV file that lists the image filename, page number, width, and height.

extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet
extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF into memory streams and merge them horizontally into a single PNG sprite sheet using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-images-to-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images and Generate PDF/A‑2b Document
extract-images-to-pdfa2b.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on new pages, and convert the result to a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3-with-encryption.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
extract-pdf-images-to-s3-with-encryption.description: The sample extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converts them to PNG streams, and uploads each to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as PNG files to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images.

extract-pdf-images-create-video-slidesho.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
extract-pdf-images-create-video-slidesho.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then generate a video slideshow from the saved PNG files with FFmpeg.

extract-pdf-images-to-gcs.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-gcs.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract images from a PDF file and upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Shows how to search each PDF page for a specific keyword using TextFragmentAbsorber and then extract only the images from pages where the keyword is found.

extract-text-from-pdf-pages-with-progres.title: Extract Text from PDF Pages with Progress Bar
extract-text-from-pdf-pages-with-progres.description: Shows how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor while updating a console progress bar.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF, save them as JPEG files, and generate a markdown file that displays the images as a gallery.

extract-text-images-from-pdfs.title: Extract Text and Images from PDFs in a Docker Volume
extract-text-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates a console service that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract full text and all images from PDF files located in a mounted volume, saving results to an output directory.
